tool_args.label: Bus Queue Jump Signal at Tremont Av & Grand Concourse
tool_args.raw_text: Fall 2024: Bus Queue Jump Signals at Tremont Av & Grand Concourse

payload.description: Gives buses a head start, bypassing traffic at major intersections. Installed at Grand Concourse & Tremont Av. No change to signal timing – buses share existing Leading Pedestrian Interval (LPI).

tool_args.label: Tremont Avenue Busway from Third Av to Southern Blvd
tool_args.raw_text: Spring 2025: Busway from Third Av to Southern Blvd

payload.description: Busway from Third Av to Southern Blvd. Buses, trucks, emergency vehicles & Access-a-Ride vans can travel through entire corridor. Local access allowed for all other vehicles. Maintains existing parking, loading, deliveries & customer access to businesses.
payload.location_text: Third Av to Southern Blvd on Tremont Avenue

tool_args.label: Eastbound Offset Bus Lane Gateway Treatment
tool_args.raw_text: Additional gateway treatment: 4 blocks of offset bus lane approaching busway (Webster Av to Third Av, eastbound only)

payload.description: 4 blocks of offset bus lane from Webster Av to Third Av, eastbound only, to help buses reach the busway. Retains most or all parking.
